featured.title: Redefining Excellence
featured.description: We create bespoke experiences that transcend the ordinary. Every detail is meticulously orchestrated to reflect your unique vision.

team.title: Our Team of Experts
team.subtitle: Excellence at the service of your ambitions
team.description: A passionate team dedicated to transforming every detail of your event into an imperishable memory.
team.testimonial: Excellence is not an act, but a habit. Our team strives every day to turn this vision into reality for our most demanding clients.

identity.title: Identity & Vision
identity.description: At the heart of ORIOTEL, a passionate team cultivates excellence to transform each ambition into a prestigious reality.

headquarters.title: Headquarters & Prestige
headquarters.description: Our Parisian headquarters embodies the elegance and professionalism that we breathe into each of our services.

collaboration.title: Collaboration & Events
collaboration.description: Every event is the fruit of close collaboration and limitless creativity to surprise and leave a mark.

innovation.title: Innovation & Excellence
innovation.description: We constantly push back the boundaries of innovation to offer unique experiences at the cutting edge of technology.

history.title: Our History
history.subtitle: A journey marked by excellence and innovation.

items.founding_desc: Creation of ORIOTEL in Paris with a vision of event excellence.
items.expansion_desc: Opening of our first international office and expansion of our service offering.
items.awards_desc: ORIOTEL receives the award for the best event agency of the year.
items.digital_desc: Launch of our hybrid and 100% digital event solutions.
items.milestone_desc: Symbolic milestone of 500 events successfully organized worldwide.
items.future_desc: Launch of our integrated platform and expansion into new markets.

company.slogan: Excellence at the service of your ambitions
company.description: ORIOTEL is a company specializing in the organization of premium events and the provision of high-quality professional services. Our commitment to excellence sets us apart.
company.longDescription: ORIOTEL has established itself as a key player in premium events, combining innovation, elegance, and performance at the service of your success.
